info.title: Fortress CoStar Scraper
info.description: Reproduces MC CoStar workflows C1 (buyer search), C2 (top-5 reverse wholesale), C3 (national buyers), C4 (comps), C5/C6/C7 (property lookup / listing status / property-type confirm). Static Bearer auth via proxy service. All searches cost against the 500/month CoStar export cap; check /quota before large runs. Coordinate with Brent Kakwitch on 2FA before first use each session.

post.summary: Comparable-buyer search. mode=full for Under Contract full research (C1, 5-10 exports). mode=top5 for Opp Stage 2+ pre-marketing shortlist (C2, 1-2 exports, radius drops to 25mi and date to 18mo). mode=national for Phase 3 national buyer discovery (C3, no radius, min portfolio 3). Auto-excludes REIT/government/non-profit/institutional. Feeds Interested_Buyers junction CSV in Salesforce with Source__c='CoStar_Buyer_Search'.

property_type.description: Industrial Warehouse | Industrial Flex | Industrial Manufacturing

subject_size_sf.description: Size of subject property in SF; used with multiplier for size band

subject_address.description: Full address; used for radius geo filter

post.summary: Sales + lease comps for underwriting brief (C4). Runs at Opp Stage 1-2. Costs ~2-3 exports per call.

200.description: .sales[] and .leases[] each with comp_address/price/price_per_sf/date/size_sf; leases add rent_per_sf/lease_type.

get.summary: Property lookup — covers C5 (photo URL for OM), C6 (90-day listing re-check for LT-FU leads: returns listing_status + broker_name), and C7 (Agent 1 authoritative property-type/occupancy/cap-rate confirmation). No export consumed.

200.description: property_url, property_type, size_sf, occupancy, cap_rate, listing_status, broker_name, broker_contact, photo_url.

get.summary: Check current CoStar + Reonomy usage against limits. Call before any large run to avoid burning the monthly cap.

200.description: { costar: { limits, usage }, reonomy: { limits, usage } }
